package rulecoverage

func PositiveMiddlewareTypeOutsideMiddlewarePackage() string {
    ruleID := "middleware_type_outside_middleware_package"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Shared middleware types and constructors declared in handlers or services instead of a middleware-focused package."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
